description_long: This object is a rectangular, blocky filing cabinet with a wood grain texture covering all visible surfaces. The cabinet has a simple, monolithic appearance with no visible handles, drawers, or hardware, giving it a minimalist and modern look. The wood finish is medium brown with darker streaks, resembling walnut or teak, and the grain pattern runs consistently across the top and sides. There are no visible seams, joints, or decorative elements, suggesting a solid or slab-style construction. The cabinet's proportions are squat and wide, making it appear more like a low storage unit or credenza than a tall filing cabinet. Its design would fit well in contemporary urban environments, such as offices, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A low, rectangular filing cabinet with a seamless wood grain finish and minimalist design, lacking visible handles or hardware.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat, uninterrupted wood grain surface with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Right-side view reveals the same wood grain texture and blocky shape, with no additional features.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, maintaining the seamless wood finish and lack of visible components.
description_view_3: Left-side view is identical to the right, with continuous wood grain and no distinguishing features.
